name: Loopio RFP Response Platform API
what_it_does: RFP and security questionnaire response platform with REST API — automating RFP, DDQ, and security questionnaire responses using a searchable content library with AI-powered answer suggestions, enabling team collaboration and reviews, tracking completion status and deadlines, and integrating with CRM and project management tools.
use_cases: Automating RFP and DDQ response population from content library via API integration
Managing content library updates and version control for approved answer sets
Integrating Loopio project status with Salesforce for RFP opportunity tracking
Querying response analytics (win rates, time-to-complete, bottlenecks) for operations
Automating stakeholder review assignments via API when responses reach review stage
not_for: Simple sales proposals and quotes (use PandaDoc or Proposify)
Contract management and CLM (use Ironclad or DocuSign CLM)
Customer-facing interactive demos (use Navattic or Walnut)
best_when: A B2B company that regularly responds to RFPs, DDQs, and security questionnaires wants to speed up response time with AI-powered content suggestions and structured collaboration workflows.
avoid_when: You rarely respond to formal RFPs (lower ROI), need simple proposal templates, or want contract lifecycle management rather than RFP-specific automation.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow. Bearer token with org-scoped access and role-based permissions. Webhook for project status changes and deadline events. Salesforce, HubSpot, Slack, and Jira native integrations. API token option for server integrations.

pricing.paid_tiers: Essential, Business, Enterprise tiers; contact sales for pricing
pricing.notes: Canadian company (Toronto). Founded 2014. Raised $75M Series C (2022). Backed by Sumeru Equity Partners, OMERS Ventures. Magic Export differentiator — AI fills answers directly into original RFP document format. Security questionnaire automation for CAIQ, SIG, VSAQ templates. Slack Magic Bot for instant answers. Strong in technology, financial services, and healthcare companies.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; contact for details

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for projects, library entries, responses, and analytics. OAuth2 auth. Good API documentation. AI Magic Export is a document-processing workflow — async for large RFPs. Content library quality determines AI suggestion accuracy. Webhook for project and deadline events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Project reads fully idempotent. Library reads idempotent. Response reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by period.
known_agent_gotchas: OAuth2 required — more complex than API key auth
AI answer quality depends on library completeness — requires investment to populate
Magic Export (filling original RFP document) is async — processing time varies
Security questionnaire templates (CAIQ, SIG) require specific library structure
Annual contract — validate before API integration investment

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR compliant. US, Canadian, and EU data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Security questionnaire responses are highly sensitive — restrict API access strictly. Competitor pricing and technical architecture in RFP responses require access control. Canadian company with strong PIPEDA and GDPR compliance.
